description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a predominantly dark green and black color scheme accented by yellow lines and metallic components. The main body is rectangular with a cylindrical barrel running along its length, and a visible gas or recoil tube beneath. The stock is skeletonized with three large circular cutouts, providing a lightweight yet sturdy grip. The receiver area includes detailed mechanical parts, such as a visible bolt and a prominent trigger guard. The fore-end appears reinforced, and the overall construction suggests a modern, high-durability firearm suitable for urban tactical scenarios. The finish is mostly matte with some glossy highlights on metallic parts.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a green and black body, yellow accents, and a skeletonized stock. It features a robust, detailed build with visible mechanical components and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the skeletonized stock, yellow-accented receiver, and the cylindrical barrel with a visible gas or recoil tube beneath.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, the alignment of the barrel, and the compact width of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same structural features as view 0, with clear visibility of the stock cutouts and the receiver's mechanical details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the receiver, showing the circular cutouts and the back of the action mechanism.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with a reinforced, solid structure
